Operational Incident Report — Lac Viet Materials JSC (Issuer) — Draft, not for public release dated 2024-09-18.
Registered details: GPKD 0234567890; MST 0317889456; HQ: 19 Duong Thuy Khe, Phuong Hoa Nam, Quan Phu Thien, TP.Minh Long, VN.
Context: Under VN Securities Law and Saigon Capital Exchange (SCE) Listing Rules, this incident involves non-public issuer information.
Event: unauthorized auto-forward from treasury@lacvietmaterials.vn was configured via Outlook rules by an employee account on 2024-09-18.
Employee: Ms. Nguyen Thi Lan, Deputy Finance; personal email lan.nguyen@lacvietmail.vn; mobile +84 93 456 7801.
Local IDs: CCCD 0 7 3 0 1 9 5 4 2 3 6 0 1 (collected per Decree 13) and Passport PN123456 (invalid checksum — placeholder only).
Banking: Account No. 258-998734-01 at Mekong Star Bank, Tan Dinh Branch; benign public hotline 1800 0088 listed on the bank site.
Payment order ref PO-24-0918 appeared as split text in scan: PO-24-0 918; settlement code VN-03 17—889—456 in ledger export.
MNPI: internal Q3 draft indicates EBITDA margin rising to 12.4% and deferral of Long Giang plant capex; price-sensitive if disclosed prior to SCE announcement.
MNPI: draft board resolution proposes rights issue at VND 23,500 per share, ratio 3:10; not yet filed with Nha Trang Securities Supervisory Authority (NSSA).
Transactions: employee submitted vendor transfer VND 1,250,000,000; beneficiary acc 431-77-00291 at Mekong Star Bank; no MAC addresses or device serials were logged.
Incident team contact: sirt@lacvietmaterials.vn; alternate +84 90 000 0000 is a placeholder line for general queries only.
CRM stored phone as 0934- 5678- 01 and address “Lo B2, Duong Huong Giang, Phuong Tan Phu, TP.Minh Long” (fictional), causing validation errors.
URL artifacts indicate auto-forward of draft: https://ir.lacvietmaterials.vn/draft?doc=Q3_2024&cccd=0730195423601&acc=25899873401.
Attachment form text includes: Name: ______; ID: ______; Address: ______; Position: Treasury Manager; MST: 0000000000 (generic placeholder).
Remediation: disabled auto-forward rule, rotated passwords, initiated recall of payments, and prepared confidential notice to SCE Surveillance Unit; public helpline 1900 0000 is for general inquiries only.
